chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-3958 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on CMA No.19621/2023. 2. For orders on CMA No.18205/2023. 3. For hearing of main case. 05.09.2023. Petitioner is present in person. ------ YOUSUF ALI SAYEED, J. - The Petitioner has invoked the jurisdiction of this Court under Article 199 of the Constitution, seeking that the security forces deployed for the protection of VIPs be recalled, whilst simultaneously praying that directions be issued to the Chief Secretary, Government of Sindh and the upper echelons of the Police Force to recall the personnel deployed in other Provinces and cities, as well as to take appropriate measures for maintenance of public order and security, including increasing the patrolling of police all over Karachi. He also seeks information as to the deployment of officials and police constables in every Police Station, and issuance of directions for disciplinary action against officials found to be acting in dereliction of duty. Having examined the pleadings we have observed that while the Petitioner contends that the so called VIP deployments are being made for the benefit of unentitled persons, the Petition is completely bereft of the particulars of any such persons. Furthermore, the remaining prayers are so vague and general as to scarcely present a fit case for issuance of a writ. 2 That being so, while granting the application for urgency, we hereby dismiss the Petition in limine, along with the other miscellaneous applications. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
